code:
import{useAuth}from'./useAuth';export function useApi(){const _useAuth=useAuth(),token=_useAuth.token;async function get(url){const res=await fetch(url,{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer ".concat(token),'Content-Type':'application/json'}});if(!res.ok)throw new Error(await res.text());return res.json();}// Pode adicionar POST, PUT, DELETE conforme necessário
return{get};}
